name: Naveen Kanaparthi
title: Data Transformation Engineer
bio: Data Transformation Engineer with 2+ years of experience in data engineering and analytics. Skilled in building and optimizing data pipelines, automating workflows, and leveraging cloud platforms for efficient data processing and analysis.
shortBio: Data Engineer specializing in pipeline optimization and analytics automation
longBio:
I'm a Data Transformation Engineer with 2+ years of experience in data engineering and analytics. Currently working as a consultant with Tata Consultancy Services Ltd, where I'm deployed to Qualcomm Technologies Inc in San Diego, California (September 2024 - Present). Previously worked with Apple Inc as a client (November 2023 - August 2024) and as a Data Analyst at Myriad Genetics (January 2023 - November 2023).

My expertise includes building and optimizing data pipelines, automating workflows, and leveraging cloud platforms for efficient data processing and analysis. I'm proficient in Python, SQL, AWS, GCP, and various data engineering tools. I hold a Master's degree in Applied Computer Science from Northwest Missouri State University and a Bachelor's in Computer Science and Engineering from JNTU Hyderabad.

I'm passionate about transforming raw data into meaningful insights that drive business decisions and improve operational efficiency.
